channel.title: WildFrame Journal
channel.description: Field notes and stories from the wild — landscape, wildlife, and macro photography.

item.title: Tracking Wolves in Bialowieza
item.description: Three days inside Europe's last primeval forest, waiting for a shadow that moves between the trees only at dusk.

item.title: The Dolomites at First Light
item.description: Why I drive four hours in the dark to be alone with the mountains before anyone else arrives.

item.title: A World One Centimetre Wide
item.description: The surprising universe that exists in a single hedgerow on an October morning.

item.title: What I Actually Use in the Field
item.description: After years of testing, this is the kit that earns its weight.
